message:
chore: add ephemeral test/runtime artifacts to .gitignore

Ignore storage.sqlite3.activity.lock (runtime lock file from the MCP
server), test_bug and test_dotenv (throwaway agent-generated test
directories that accumulate in the repo root).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -283,3 +283,8 @@ release-artifacts/
 
 # Codex temp directory
 .codex-tmp/
+
+# Ephemeral test/runtime artifacts
+storage.sqlite3.activity.lock
+test_bug
+test_dotenv
